name: First Heritage
description_short: First Heritage Mortgage Services is a credit union-owned mortgage company (CUSO) providing first mortgage solutions, government loan programs, and member financing services to credit unions nationwide.
description_long:
First Heritage Mortgage Services was established in 1996 as a Credit Union Service Organization (CUSO) to provide first mortgage solutions specifically designed for credit unions and financial institutions. Operating under the credit union philosophy of 'people helping people,' the company serves as a mortgage partner that enables credit unions of all asset sizes to offer home financing options to their members while strengthening member relationships and generating additional revenue streams.

First Heritage offers a comprehensive suite of mortgage products and services including conventional first mortgages, first-time homebuyer programs, FHA loans, VA loans, USDA loans, and PHFA (Pennsylvania Housing Finance Agency) loans. The company provides marketing support with customizable advertising options, staff training, member mortgage seminars, mortgage calculators, and educational tools designed to build member awareness and deepen member education around home financing. As of February 2025, First Heritage has achieved $2.1 billion in mortgage servicing assets, demonstrating significant scale in the market.

What distinguishes First Heritage is its exclusive focus on serving credit unions rather than direct consumers. The company is licensed to operate in 33 states across the country and actively works to expand its geographic footprint. The company maintains a dedicated staff of experienced mortgage professionals and holds membership and endorsements from industry organizations like NACUSO (National Association of Federally-Insured Credit Unions). First Heritage also demonstrates community engagement through sponsoring charitable events and holding annual users conferences for credit union partners.

A critical caveat is that First Heritage does NOT work directly with consumers—it is a B2B mortgage service provider exclusively for credit unions and financial institutions. Individual homebuyers seeking mortgages cannot apply directly to First Heritage; they must work through their credit union partner, which has contracted with First Heritage to provide mortgage services. This business model is fundamentally different from consumer-facing mortgage lenders.
services: Mortgage servicing (currently servicing $2.1 billion in assets)
Marketing support and customizable advertising for credit unions
Mortgage seminars for credit union members
Staff training for credit union employees
pros: Licensed in 33 states with active expansion of geographic footprint
$2.1 billion in mortgage servicing assets as of February 2025, indicating scale and stability
Offers specialized first-time homebuyer programs designed for credit union members
Provides government-backed loan options including FHA, VA, USDA, and PHFA programs
Includes staff training, member seminars, and educational marketing support tools
Credit union-owned structure aligns with member-benefit philosophy
Operates with experienced mortgage professionals and industry endorsements (NACUSO)
cons: Not a direct consumer lender—only accessible through partnered credit unions, limiting individual access
No information provided about interest rates, APRs, or specific loan terms on website
Limited transparency on underwriting standards, credit score requirements, or approval criteria
Website focuses on institutional benefits rather than member-facing product details
No mention of online application capabilities or digital mortgage processing tools
best_for: Credit unions seeking to expand mortgage offerings without building internal mortgage departments
Credit union members in the 33-licensed states who want to finance home purchases through their institution
Financial institutions looking to increase member relationships and revenue through mortgage services
First-time homebuyers whose credit union has partnered with First Heritage Mortgage Services
diagnosis: First Heritage is designed exclusively for credit unions and financial institutions, not individual consumers—anyone seeking a mortgage must work through a credit union partner that has contracted with First Heritage. This company is ideal for credit unions of any asset size wanting to offer competitive mortgage products without developing in-house expertise, particularly those serving first-time homebuyers or members needing government-backed loans across the 33 licensed states.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: First Heritage — Credit Union in Corning, NY | CreditDoc
meta_description: First Heritage — NCUA-insured credit union in Corning, NY. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
